expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task statuses so users can update, view, and filter task progress.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status persistence",
      "description": "As a product team, I want each task to store a status with a pending default so that task progress persists consistently.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Tasks store a status value of pending, in_progress, or done",
        "Existing tasks default to 'pending' after migration or backfill",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/add_task_status.sql",
        "src/db/schema/tasks.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Add shared task status model",
      "description": "As a developer, I want shared task status types and serialization rules so that backend and UI use the same status contract.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Shared task status type is available to list and update flows",
        "Status labels map consistently to stored values",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/models/task.ts",
        "src/types/task-status.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add backend task status update action",
      "description": "As a user, I want task status changes to save from the task list so that updates persist immediately.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Backend action validates pending, in_progress, and done status values",
        "Saving a new status updates the task record and returns the persisted value",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/actions/update-task-status.ts",
        "src/server/routes/tasks.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Show task status badges on task cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want each task card to display the current status badge so that I can scan progress quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards display the persisted status badge for each task",
        "Badge labels distinguish pending, in progress, and done states",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/task-card.tsx",
        "src/components/tasks/status-badge.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Add task list status control",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change task status from the task list so that I can update progress without opening a detail view.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task rows expose a status control with pending, in progress, and done options",
        "Changing the control saves the new status and refreshes the visible state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/task-row.tsx",
        "src/components/tasks/status-select.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add task list status filtering",
      "description": "As a user, I want to filter the task list by status so that I can focus on the tasks relevant to my workflow.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list filter offers All, Pending, In Progress, and Done options",
        "Selecting a filter updates the visible task list to matching statuses only",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/task-list.tsx",
        "src/components/tasks/task-filters.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover schema, backend status updates, badge display, status controls, and filtering.
